title: ageratina guatemalensis
intro: Ageratina guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ageratina guatemalensis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Ageratina guatemalensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
